isolation.pattern: httptest.NewRecorder — no real server, no shared state

VAL-HLT-001.title: Health returns structured status
VAL-HLT-001.evidence: Response contains config, upstream, and ffmpeg fields at data level. Test verified presence of all three subsections in structured health response.
VAL-HLT-001.testOutput:
=== RUN   TestHealthEndpointReturnsStructuredStatus
--- PASS: TestHealthEndpointReturnsStructuredStatus (0.02s)
PASS
ok  	github.com/rabesss/impartus-cli/internal/server	0.023s

VAL-HLT-002.title: Health reports config validity
VAL-HLT-002.evidence: config.status field correctly reflects config state: 'ok' with valid config, 'misconfigured' with missing/nil config. All four sub-scenarios verified.
VAL-HLT-002.testOutput:
=== RUN   TestHealthConfigStatusOkWithValidConfig
--- PASS: TestHealthConfigStatusOkWithValidConfig (0.02s)
=== RUN   TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithMissingFields
--- PASS: TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithMissingFields (0.13s)
=== RUN   TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithAllMissingFields
--- PASS: TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithAllMissingFields (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithNilConfig
--- PASS: TestHealthConfigStatusMisconfiguredWithNilConfig (0.00s)
PASS
ok  	github.com/rabesss/impartus-cli/internal/server	0.153s

VAL-HLT-003.title: Health reports upstream reachability
VAL-HLT-003.evidence: upstream.status field present: reports 'reachable' with valid base URL, 'unreachable' with bad/missing base URL.
VAL-HLT-003.testOutput:
=== RUN   TestHealthUpstreamStatusWithValidBaseUrl
--- PASS: TestHealthUpstreamStatusWithValidBaseUrl (0.02s)
=== RUN   TestHealthUpstreamStatusWithUnreachableBaseUrl
--- PASS: TestHealthUpstreamStatusWithUnreachableBaseUrl (0.00s)
PASS
ok  	github.com/rabesss/impartus-cli/internal/server	0.023s

VAL-HLT-004.title: Health reports FFmpeg availability
VAL-HLT-004.evidence: ffmpeg.status field present in response. FFmpeg is available on this system (confirmed via `ffmpeg -version` in environment).
VAL-HLT-004.testOutput:
=== RUN   TestHealthFFmpegStatus
--- PASS: TestHealthFFmpegStatus (0.11s)
PASS
ok  	github.com/rabesss/impartus-cli/internal/server	0.115s

VAL-HLT-005.title: Health still works without auth
VAL-HLT-005.evidence: GET /api/v1/health returns 200 without Authorization header. Health endpoint is publicly accessible.
VAL-HLT-005.testOutput:
=== RUN   TestHealthNoAuthRequired
--- PASS: TestHealthNoAuthRequired (0.02s)
PASS
ok  	github.com/rabesss/impartus-cli/internal/server	0.022s

summary: Tested 5 assertions for cache-health milestone: all 5 passed. Health endpoint returns structured status with config/upstream/ffmpeg subsections, correctly reflects config validity, reports upstream reachability, detects FFmpeg availability, and remains publicly accessible without auth. Total test execution time: ~0.33s across all 5 assertion groups (10 sub-tests).
